name: Sartrouville  France
message: Sartrouville is a commune in the Yvelines department, Île-de-France, north central France. it is located in the north-western suburbs of Paris, 17.1 km from the center of Paris.  It employs 501-1,000 people and has $100M-$250M of revenue. Is headquartered in Sartrouville, Ile-de-France, 78500, France.
